arts.ttl: Tottenham agree £50m deal for Bayern's Tel - Friday's gossip
arts.sum: Tottenham agree £50m deal with Bayern Munich for Mathys Tel, Al-Nassr plot £90m offer for Brighton's Kaoru Mitoma, Ollie Watkins open to joining Arsenal, plus more.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich preparing for Thomas Müller’s possible retirement
arts.sum: If Müller were to retire, it would free up 17 million euros a year in wages. Despite limited playtime and production in the twilight of his career, he is still one of the highest earners at the club.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola, Vincent Kompany look ahead to possible Bayern Munich-Manchester City Champions League playoff
arts.sum: “Real Madrid or Bayern Munich; one is the king of the competition, the other one is maybe the second or third king of the competition,” quipped Guardiola in comments captured by City Xtra, via @iMiaSanMia . If City does not draw Bayern it will face Real Madrid .

arts.ttl: Who is Mathys Tel? Man Utd, Arsenal and Chelsea target set for major deadline-beating transfer
arts.sum: Tottenham have agreed a £50million deal with Bayern Munich to sign French striker Mathys Tel but the transfer is far from guaranteed, as Manchester United, Arsenal and Chelsea consider a late hijack

arts.ttl: Report: Saudi Pro League outfit makes Arsenal target Mathys Tel an option in transfer twist
arts.sum: Saudi Pro League club Al-Ahli are set to rock the apple cart as they have reportedly made Bayern Munich forward Mathys Tel an option. CaughtOffisde reported today that the teenager wants to leave the Bundesliga club in search of game-time. A whole host of clubs in the Premier League are said to be keen on […] The post Report: Saudi Pro League outfit makes Arsenal target Mathys Tel an option in transfer twist appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Tottenham transfer news: Spurs see £50m bid accepted for Bayern Munich attacker?
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are reportedly leading the race for Bayern Munich youngster Mathys Tel, with Spurs seeing a £50m bid for the Frenchman accepted.

arts.ttl: Bavarian Podcast Works — Weekend Warm-up Show Season 4, Episode 29: Bayern Munich and Mathys Tel look headed for a divorce...who is at fault?; Vincent Kompany needs to take accountability for the team’s poor showings; and MORE!
arts.sum: Bayern Munich’s last days of the transfer window could be wild... If Tottenham Hotspur wants to pay a crazy fee for Tel, Bayern Munich should sell him.

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich aiming to reboot winger position
arts.sum: Coman, Sané, and Gnabry cost Bayern a whopping 56 million euros a year in wages. Serge Gnabry earns around €19m/year, Kingsley Coman €17m and Leroy Sané €20m.

arts.ttl: Bayern and Tottenham reach agreement for Mathys Tel
arts.sum: According to various reports, Bayern Munich and Tottenham have agreed a deal for Mathys Tel, but the player himself has yet to decide whether he wants the move to happen.

arts.ttl: Sources: Tottenham have now changed their proposal to Bayern Munich in Mathys Tel discussions
arts.sum: TBR Football can exclusively confirm that Tottenham Hotspur have made a change in their proposal to Bayern Munich over Mathys Tel. Spurs are eager to...
